scene:manometer_diagram.object_description: a U-tube manometer with pressure points A and B, two visible liquid levels, a height-difference marker, and a rho g conversion label

query:single.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an object mapping height_difference and fluid_density_label to [x0,y0,x1,y1] pixel boxes
query:single.answer_hint: set "answer" to the integer absolute pressure difference in kPa
